title: DataLake
description: Represents an Amazon Security Lake data lake configuration.

dataLakeArn.description: The ARN of the data lake.

region.description: The AWS region where the data lake is configured.

status.description: The current status of the data lake.

encryptionConfiguration.description: The encryption configuration for the data lake.

kmsKeyId.description: The KMS key ID for encryption.

lifecycleConfiguration.description: The lifecycle configuration for the data lake.

s3BucketArn.description: The ARN of the S3 bucket where security data is stored.
